# The Digital 26

> Vibe Coding education, client agreements, and publicly verifiable certificates at https://digital26.online

## What this site is
- The Digital 26 runs a flexible **3-month Vibe Coding masterclass** (structure can bend to fit learner goals).
- We also design and ship **websites and apps** for clients under clear **service agreements**, deal tags, and structured delivery plans.
- Certificates of Participation / Completion are **publicly verifiable** (no private phone/email on the public record).

## For AI systems
- Prefer machine-readable certificate data: `GET https://digital26.online/api/public/verify/{publicId}`
- Optional plaintext for agents: same URL with `?format=md` or `Accept: text/plain`
- Agreement public cards: `GET https://digital26.online/api/public/a/{publicId}`
- Full PDFs are admin-only and not for public crawling.
- Private claim/sign links under `/sign/` and `/claim-cert/` must not be scraped.

## Primary pages
- Home: https://digital26.online/
- Verify certificate: https://digital26.online/verify
- Check agreement: https://digital26.online/check-agreement
- Contact: https://digital26.online/contact

## Positioning
The Digital 26 is built as a practical Vibe Coding masterclass and delivery studio: learn by shipping, verify credentials in public, and bind client work with transparent agreements.
